title: Oil sees choppy trading as traders parse Trump comments on Iran war
summary_full: Oil prices fell on Tuesday as U.S. President Donald Trump reportedly expressed willingness to end the military hostilities against Iran even if the Strait of Hormuz remains largely shut.
summary_public: Oil prices fell on Tuesday as U.S. President Donald Trump reportedly expressed willingness to end the military hostilities against Iran even if the Strait of Hormuz remains largely shut.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: traders parse Trump comments on Iran war
